title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Codex and Claude Code across five dimensions: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues the Codex versus Claude Code framing is the wrong question to ask and emphasizes focus on other factors for building quickly.
